name: @openvole/paw-markets
description: US stock market tracking, news, and trend monitoring — brain-free polling, an embedded dashboard panel, and channel alerts

tools.name: stock_quote
tools.description: Latest price and change for one or more US tickers (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, NVDA)

tools.name: stock_trend
tools.description: Computed trend indicators for a ticker: % changes (1d/5d/1mo), SMA20/50, 52-week high/low, volume vs average, RSI

tools.name: stock_history
tools.description: Daily closing prices for a US ticker (for charts)

tools.name: stock_news
tools.description: Recent news headlines for a US ticker

tools.name: stock_watchlist
tools.description: Manage the tracked watchlist: list, add, or remove symbols

tools.name: market_report
tools.description: Latest snapshot of the watchlist (quotes + trends + alerts) — call this to comment on the market
